name: Hyper Combat Unit Dangaioh
original_name: 破邪大星ダンガイオー
overview: Brought together by the mysterious Dr. Tarsan, four powerful psychic warriors Mia Alice, Lamba Nom, Pai Thunder, and Roll Kran can unite four powerful planes to form Dangaioh—the most powerful weapon in the universe.

trailers.title: Opening 1 | Cross Fight! -  Mitsuko Horie and Ichirou Mizuki
